name: SSL/TLS Certificate Anomaly Investigation
description: Investigates SSL/TLS certificate anomalies including self-signed certificates on production services, expired certificates, certificate authority mismatches, and potential man-in-the-middle (MITM) indicators. Riggs AI analyzes the certificate chain, issuer reputation, and connection context. Confirmed MITM or malicious certificates trigger traffic blocking, affected user notification, and IR escalation. Expired or misconfigured certificates are routed to the infrastructure team for remediation.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Palo Alto NGFW
required_integrations.reason: Block traffic to destinations presenting malicious or MITM certificates

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create tickets for certificate remediation or IR escalation

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify security or infrastructure teams of certificate anomalies

config.description: Triggers when network monitoring detects SSL/TLS certificate anomalies including self-signed certs, expired certs, CA mismatches, or potential MITM indicators

config.additional_instructions: Analyze the SSL/TLS certificate: validate chain of trust, check issuer against known CAs, verify subject/SAN match, check expiry, and compare against Certificate Transparency logs. Determine if this is a MITM attack, misconfiguration, or expired cert.
config.description: AI-powered certificate chain analysis to determine if the anomaly indicates a MITM attack, misconfiguration, or operational issue
Routes based on whether the certificate anomaly indicates an active MITM attack versus a configuration or operational issue

parameters.comment: Potential MITM — Malicious certificate from {{trigger_1.alert.destination_domain}}, Issuer: {{trigger_1.alert.cert_issuer}}

config.description: Blocks outbound traffic to the destination presenting the malicious certificate to protect users from MITM interception
Creates a P1 incident ticket for IR team to investigate potential MITM infrastructure on the network path
Sends critical alert to the IR team about the potential MITM attack with containment status
Routes expired or misconfigured certificate alerts to the infrastructure team for remediation without security escalation
SSL/TLS certificate anomaly investigation workflow complete
